title: Yakup ERDOĞAN, Assistant Professor/ MD
content:
Yakup ERDOĞAN, Assistant Professor/ MD

Asst. Prof.

Faculty of Medicine / Department of Child and Adolescent Psychiatry

yakup.erdogan

uskudar.edu.tr

Higher Education Council Formatted CV

Rate Us

Short CV

Yakup ERDOĞAN graduated from Marmara University Faculty of Medicine in 2010. He completed his residency in 2018 at Süleyman Demirel University, Department of Child and Adolescent Psychiatry. ERDOĞAN is currently working as an Assistant Professor at Üsküdar University Faculty of Medicine, Department of Child and Adolescent Psychiatry.
